LandingFAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
LandingFAQ.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our platform.

q1.question: Is Zacky free to use?
q1.answer: Yes, we offer a generous free tier with daily generation limits. You can upgrade to Pro for unlimited access.

q2.question: How does the AI generation work?
q2.answer: We use advanced AI models to process your text prompts and generate high-quality content in seconds.

q3.question: Can I use the generated content commercially?
q3.answer: Yes! All content generated by Zacky is owned by you and can be used for commercial projects.

q4.question: What payment methods do you accept?
q4.answer: We accept all major credit cards and secure online payment methods via Stripe.
